'''''Polyhedron'' 165''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[December]] of [[2003]] that appeared as part of '''Dungeon Magazine 106'''.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*''[[Ord Vaxal: Prison Planet of the Empire]]''
*''[[Starships of the Galaxy: Arakyd Industries Trident-class Surveyor]]''
